---
title: "SecureLife — BraindAI Assessment Notes"
author: "Candidate"
date: 2026-06-22
format: html
---

# Summary

This QMD is a rapid, portable report capturing architecture decisions, prompt engineering templates, validation strategy, and next steps for the SecureLife MVP.

## Architecture Snapshot

- Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router, TypeScript) — fast iteration and Vercel-friendly.
- Database: Supabase (Postgres) — quick auth + row-level security, easy dev setup.
- AI: Anthropic Claude for extraction & analysis; fallback to GPT-4.1-mini for edge cases.
- PDF processing: `pdf-parse` + OCR fallback (Tesseract).

## Prompting Strategy

- Use structured JSON outputs and Zod validation.
- Two-step extraction: raw -> normalize.
- Iterative repair loops for high-value fields.

## Deliverable Checklist

- [ ] Chatbot captures leads and writes to DB
- [ ] Upload & extract sample policies
- [ ] Dashboard shows lead pipeline
- [ ] Loom walkthrough recorded

## Next steps

1. Harden schema validation and add human-in-the-loop review UI.
2. Add background jobs for large document processing.
3. Add unit tests for prompt outputs.
